name: Hyderabadi Biryani
description: Rich, aromatic and spicy basmati rice cooked with tender marinated meat and exotic spices. A classic Royal Indian dish.

name: Butter Chicken
description: Creamy, tomato-based curry with succulent chicken pieces. Mildly spiced and buttery smooth.

name: Misal Pav
description: A spicy sprout curry topped with farsa and onions, served with buttered bread rolls. A popular Maharashtrian street food.

name: Masala Dosa
description: Thin, crispy rice crepe stuffed with a spiced potato filling. Served with coconut chutney and sambar. A healthy South Indian breakfast.

name: Szechuan Noodles
description: Fiery and spicy stir-fried noodles with crisp vegetables and bold Szechuan peppers. Perfect for spice lovers.

name: Avocado Toast
description: Creamy avocado mash on toasted sourdough with a dash of lime and chili flakes. A fresh and healthy breakfast option.

name: Tandoori Chicken
description: Chicken marinated in yogurt and spices, roasted in a clay oven. Smoky, juicy, and spicy.

name: Paneer Tikka
description: Grilled cubes of cottage cheese marinated in spiced yogurt. A smoky and delicious vegetarian appetizer.

name: Chicken Shawarma
description: Thinly sliced roasted meat wrapped in pita bread with garlic sauce and pickles. A Middle Eastern street food favorite.

name: Quinoa Salad
description: Nutritious quinoa tossed with fresh vegetables, nuts, and a zesty lemon dressing. Grain-free and healthy.

name: Gulab Jamun
description: Soft, melt-in-the-mouth milk-based balls soaked in rose-flavored sugar syrup. A classic sweet Indian dessert.

name: Veg Burger
description: Juicy vegetable patty served with fresh lettuce, tomatoes, and mayo in a soft bun. A classic healthy fast-food choice.

name: Pepperoni Pizza
description: Classic Italian-American pizza topped with spicy pepperoni slices and melted mozzarella cheese.

name: Sushi Platter
description: Assorted fresh sushi rolls including salmon, tuna, and avocado. Served with wasabi and soy sauce.

name: Falafel Wrap
description: Crispy chickpea balls wrapped in flatbread with hummus, salad, and tahini sauce. A healthy Mediterranean meal.

name: Dim Sums
description: Steamed dumplings filled with minced meat or vegetables. Delicate and flavorful bite-sized portions.

name: Greek Salad
description: Fresh tomatoes, cucumbers, olives, and feta cheese tossed in olive oil and lemon juice. A light and healthy option.

name: Fish and Chips
description: Crispy battered fish served with golden fried potato chips and tartar sauce. A classic British comfort food.

name: Pav Bhaji
description: Thick vegetable curry mashed with butter and spices, served with soft buttered bread. Popular Mumbai street food.

name: Tiramisu
description: Classic Italian coffee-flavored dessert layered with mascarpone cheese and cocoa. Truly delicious and sweet.

name: Lamb Rogan Josh
description: Slow-cooked lamb in a rich, aromatic tomato and onion gravy. A Kashmiri specialty with deep flavors.

name: Mango Lassi
description: Creamy yogurt-based drink blended with sweet Alphonso mangoes. A refreshing and healthy Indian beverage.

name: Pad Thai
description: Stir-fried rice noodles with eggs, tofu, peanuts, and vegetables in a tangy tamarind sauce.

name: Chicken Tikka Pizza
description: Fusion pizza topped with spicy tandoori chicken chunks, onions, and capsicum.

name: Paneer Butter Masala
description: Rich and creamy tomato-based gravy with soft paneer cubes. A sweet and savory vegetarian favorite.

name: Waffles with Berries
description: Crispy golden waffles topped with fresh blueberries, strawberries, and maple syrup. A sweet breakfast treat.

name: Chana Masala
description: Spicy and tangy chickpea curry cooked with a blend of Indian spices. Healthy and packed with protein.

name: Lasagna
description: Layers of pasta with rich meat sauce, béchamel, and melted cheese. A hearty and delicious Italian classic.

name: Chocolate Brownie
description: Fudgy and rich chocolate brownie served warm, often with a scoop of vanilla ice cream. Purely sweet bliss.

name: Vietnamese Pho
description: Avenly noodle soup with tender slices of beef, fresh herbs, and a clear, flavorful broth. Very healthy.
